title: Supply Chain Manager - FedEx India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - FedEx India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FedEx India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About FedEx India:
FedEx India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FedEx India!
